icml-2024.title: International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2024
icml-2024.about: The International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) is the premier academic conference in machine learning. ICML is known for presenting and publishing cutting-edge research on all aspects of machine learning used in software, data science, statistics, and computing as well as important application areas such as robotic control and personalized medicine.

papers.title: Attention Is All You Need Revisited
Efficient Transformers for Long Sequences
Reinforcement Learning in Robotics Open Systems
Quantum Neural Networks for Drug Discovery
Federated Learning with Differential Privacy Guarantees

neurips-2023.title: Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2023
neurips-2023.about: Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) is a machine learning and computational neuroscience conference held every December. The conference is currently a double-track meeting that includes invited talks and oral and poster presentations of refereed papers.

papers.title: Diffusion Models for High-Resolution Image Synthesis
Scaling Laws for Neural Language Models
Self-Supervised Learning from Raw Video
